name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
features: Email weekly reports to procurement managers
Provide a dashboard for invoice status
Allow manual entry of invoices for reconciliation

locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders
must_have_features: Email weekly reports to procurement managers
Provide a dashboard for invoice status
Allow manual entry of invoices for reconciliation

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
